title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. pater-familias
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. pater-familias, also known as Star of Bethlehem, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Ornithogalum umbellatum var. pater-familias can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
